name: Zara Vost, Amaran Mandalorian
description:
Zara Vost

Amaran/ Mandalorian Bounty Hunter

Description:

Zara Vost is an Amaran Bounty Hunter that was born and raised on Typhon during the last years of the Empire. She was raised by a Mandalorian clan that has settled on Typhon. After hearing of some members of the Children of the Watch, a splinter group of the Mandalorian practicing the archaic "Way of the Mandalore", which frobids members to take off their helmets and had fallen out of mainstream Mandalorian society.

Zara is a white-furred, fox-inspired Amaran with a voluptuous, curvy body. She mostly wears her Mandalorian Beskar-Alloy armor during missions, but also takes her armor off in private or when hunting lighter foes for more flexibility. (As seen in the picture above.)

Being a Bounty Hunter, Zara is quite self-reliable and great in caring for herself. She takes great care of her ship, which also serves as her mobile home of sorts, and has many talents that help her doing this, such as repairing, tinkering and (obviously) piloting her ship.

______________________________________________

Star Wars
creator: Jimbean
